text: sira bhaṭāra akṣobhya, muṅguh riṅ pūrva, kṛṣṇa varṇanira, sira bharālī locanā devīnira, hū.m mantranira, bhūsparśa mudrānira, ādarśana jñānanira, vajra sañjatanira, riṅ abhirati ṅaran iṅ kasvarganira, gajah tutuṅgaṅanira, bhaṭāra vajrarāja, bhaṭāra vajrarāga, hyaṅ vajrasādhu, bhaṭāra vajradharādi, saṅ amarivṛtta ri sira, muṅguh pva sira riṅ śarīra, riṅ jro niṅ paruparu pinakasthānanira.
